channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: BTS Announce ‘City Las Vegas’ and ‘City Busan’ ARIRANG Immersive Experiences
item.description:
[Energetic music plays in the background]
Host: "Hey, ARMY. Get ready for some exciting news. BTS is taking over two cities with their upcoming 'BTS The City ARIRANG' events. That's right, the K-pop supergroup is bringing their unique fan experience to Las Vegas and Busan, in celebration of their comeback album, ARIRANG.
[Short music transition]
Host: "The Las Vegas event will take place from May 20th to 31st, coinciding with their concerts at Allegiant Stadium on May 23rd, 24th, 27th, and 28th. And, if you're in South Korea, you can join the party in Busan from June 5th to 21st.
[Short sound effect]
Host: "These citywide festivals will feature immersive events, citywide attractions, and iconic landmarks lit up in the album's signature red theme. Think themed hotel experiences, special food and drinks, and exclusive after-parties.
[Short music transition]
Host: "This is not the first time BTS is hosting 'The City' events. They did it back in 2022, and this time, they're scaling things up. The group is currently on their global ARIRANG tour, with shows already happening in South Korea and Japan, and a North American leg kicking off in Tampa, Florida on April 25th.
[Short sound effect]
Host: "So, mark your calendars and get ready to join the fun. For more information and schedules, check out the official announcements on social media. Don't miss out on 'BTS The City ARIRANG' in Las Vegas and Busan. It's going to be epic."
[Music and sound effects continue for another 5 seconds before fading out]
